title: Student Housing Ano Poli: Perfect 2-Bedroom Flat

about.summary: Student housing Ano Poli is a perfect private student accommodation choice near City Centre Thessaloniki. This 2 Bedroom / 2 Bed apartment is ideal for students and digital nomads.

sections.title: 🏠 Student Housing Ano Poli
sections.content: Student housing Ano Poli offers a cozy, fully equipped student accommodation option. Designed for two tenants, this private apartment features two comfortable beds and a clean setup that is ideal for students seeking privacy or sharing.
highlights: Comfortable configuration: 2 Bedroom / 2 Bed layout for sharing.
Move-in ready: Modern apartment setup on the 1st floor of the traditional Kleious building.
Fully equipped: Dedicated workspace, washing machine, dishwasher, dryer, private kitchenware, and Wi-Fi.

sections.title: 📍 Location near City Centre Thessaloniki
sections.content: Living near City Centre Thessaloniki in the beginning of Ano Poli makes commuting easy. Aristotle University and City College are within walking distance or reachable via direct bus routes from nearby bus stations.
highlights: Everything nearby: Local supermarkets, marketplaces, bakeries, cafes, and taverns are 50 meters away.
Erasmus housing: Well-positioned student housing setup in a historic and vibrant area.

sections.title: 🎓 Perfect for Erasmus Students & Nomads
sections.content:
This student housing Ano Poli is a top option for remote digital nomads and university students. For official info, visit Aristotle University and City College.

To compare other properties in the building, view our City College student apartment.

sections.title: Bills & Services
sections.content:
Maintenance, water, heating, and Wi-Fi are included. Electricity is billed separately. A bi-weekly cleaning service is available for a small fee.

We look forward to welcoming you to Thessaloniki. Reach out via the contact host button.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: Smoking is allowed outside only. Playing musical instruments is negotiable.

reviews.author: Yusuf Ad
reviews.content: My friend and I stayed here for 6 months for our Erasmus internship and had a great experience. The apartment was clean, comfortable, and had everything we needed. The location was amazing it was close to shops, public transport, the city center, and many historical places. Highly recommended for Erasmus students who want to live in Thessaloniki.

seo.seo_title: Student Housing Ano Poli: Perfect 2-Bedroom Flat
seo.seo_description: Student housing Ano Poli perfect for Erasmus students. This 2-bedroom flat is near Aristotle University and ideal for digital nomads.
